positive: A minimalist, stylized illustration of a playful cosmic adventure. The main subject is a group of whimsical, geometrically shaped celestial bodies and friendly, abstracted constellations navigating a deep space void. Emphasize strong silhouettes and clean lines, reminiscent of mid-century modern poster art blended with contemporary scientific illustration. Use a limited, harmonious color palette of deep indigo, nebula violet, burnt orange, and creamy off-white. The composition must be centralized and circular, designed to wrap seamlessly around apparel fabric. Include subtle star dust scatter and stylized planets with visible, soft gradients. Overhead, dramatic, high-contrast backlighting provides depth, giving the scene an ethereal glow against the dark background. Highly detailed vector graphic style, perfect for screen printing.
negative: blurry, noisy, artifacts, text, logo, watermark, low contrast, grayscale, bad anatomy, extra limbs, messy, photorealism, signature, grainy, dirty
